productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Formal Leather Black Shoe
description: Formal dressing only gets better with these black leather shoes from red tape. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look complement all formal and semi-casual wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.Upper Full grain leather upper with a smooth finish for maximum durability, comfort and style Tapered toe for comfort and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Long tongue for comfort Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather inner lining and padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with flowerlet grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the back heel for maximum grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
